message:
feat(response): add GatewayError serialization helper

Introduces sendGatewayError() for consistent error envelope formatting
when errors originate from gateway infrastructure.

Previously, gateway-specific errors (rate limiting, circuit breaker,
upstream timeouts) were handled inconsistently across routes. This
adds a dedicated helper that:

- Imports GatewayError type from @flywheel/shared/errors
- Serializes errors using serializeGatewayError()
- Returns properly formatted JSON error responses
- Maintains correlation ID for tracing

Example usage:
  catch (error) {
    const gatewayError = toGatewayError(error);
    return sendGatewayError(c, gatewayError);
  }

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
